candidate_definition_hints.text: Example code and documentation on how to get Stable Diffusion running with ONNX FP16 models on DirectML. Can run accelerated on all DirectML supported cards including AMD and Intel.
This repository contains a conversion tool, some examples, and instructions on how to set up Stable Diffusion with ONNX models.
